ddls:
CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent (e.g., wiki_1_94) */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of AI model used by the agent */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the agent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the agent was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the agent was last updated */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agents_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent used in the experiment */,
  "turn" INTEGER /* Turn number of the experiment */,
  "iter" INTEGER /* Iteration number of the experiment */,
  "seed" TEXT /* Seed used for the experiment */,
  "init_seed" TEXT /* Initial seed used for the experiment */,
  "log_id" TEXT /* Log ID of the experiment */,
  "nr_agents" INTEGER /* Number of agents used in the experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment outcome */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response of the experiment */,
  "prob0" REAL /* Probability of the experiment outcome */,
  "ndens0" INTEGER /* Initial density of the experiment outcome */,
  "ndens_current0" INTEGER /* Current density of the experiment outcome */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold of the experiment outcome */,
  "nr_sim" INTEGER /* Number of simulations of the experiment outcome */,
  "max_exchanges" INTEGER /* Maximum exchanges of the experiment outcome */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy metric of the experiment outcome */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision metric of the experiment outcome */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall metric of the experiment outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_outcomes_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment version was created */,
  "changes_summary" TEXT /* Summary of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
